meta.name: Product Opportunity Miner
meta.description: Analyze feedback, research, usage patterns, and market signals to produce evidence-backed product opportunities with confidence scores.

parameters.content:
## 09 — Product Opportunity Miner

**Required:**
- OpenAI API credential
- Google Sheets credential
- RESEARCH_SHEET_ID (your research repository from workflow 05)
- NOTIFICATION_EMAIL_TO

**Tip:** Run after updating your research repository. Reads the last 90 days of research items.

**Schedule:** Monthly (first Monday of the month).
**Status:** Beta.

values.content: You are a senior product strategist identifying product opportunities from research evidence. Be conservative — only propose opportunities with clear evidence. Never invent data. Return valid JSON only.

Analyze this research evidence from the last {{ $json.period_days }} days ({{ $json.total_items }} items).

Top themes by frequency:
{{ JSON.stringify($json.top_themes, null, 2) }}

Problems mentioned:
{{ JSON.stringify($json.problems.slice(0,50), null, 2) }}

Sample items:
{{ JSON.stringify($json.raw_sample.slice(0,10), null, 2) }}

Return JSON:
{
  "opportunities": [{
    "title": str,
    "description": str,
    "evidence_strength": "weak|moderate|strong",
    "confidence": 0.0-1.0,
    "evidence_count": num,
    "affected_segments": [str],
    "themes": [str],
    "market_size_signal": "niche|significant|large",
    "effort_signal": "low|medium|high",
    "supporting_evidence": [str],
    "assumptions_to_validate": [str]
  }],
  "research_gaps": [str],
  "period_summary": str
}

value.title: Approve: Product Opportunity Report
value.summary: {{ $json.opportunities.length }} opportunities identified from {{ $json.total_items_analyzed }} research items. Top: {{ $json.opportunities[0]?.title || 'N/A' }} (confidence: {{ $json.opportunities[0]?.confidence || 0 }})

value.title: 💡 Product Opportunities: {{ $('Build Opportunity Report').first().json.opportunities.length }} found
value.body: Monthly opportunity mining complete. {{ $('Build Opportunity Report').first().json.opportunities.length }} opportunities with evidence. Review the attached report and add strong ones to your roadmap.
